title: Why Is Copart, Inc. (CPRT) Down 3.1% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Copart, Inc. (CPRT) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: BetterInvesting™ Magazine Update on Copart Inc. and Charter Communications Inc.
text: TROY, Mich. , Oct. 3, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The Editorial Advisory and Securities Review Committee of BetterInvesting Magazine today announced Copart Inc. (NASDAQ: CPRT) as its "Stock to Study" and Charter Communications Inc. (NASDAQ: CHTR) as its "Undervalued Stock" in the December 2022 issue for investors' informational and educational use.

title: 10 Stocks Completely Avoid The Looming October 'Jinx'
text: October is infamous for "jinxing" investors with massive drops — the last thing anyone wants following September's fall. The post 10 Stocks Completely Avoid The Looming October 'Jinx' appeared first on Investor's Business Daily.
